name: cpig-kin-08-hardtail-bicycle
description: kin-08 Hardtail bicycle — frame (chassis) on prismatic to world, two wheels + crank on revolutes to frame, chain_drive coupling crank → rear_wheel at ratio 2.5, rolling_contact at both wheels. Forward-dynamics integrate 2s under constant 5 N·m pedal torque; bicycle rolls forward ~4 m. Phase 4.6.C transmission integration demo. Visualizes the bike skeleton at step 1500 (~75% through the integration).

setup.vlmDescription: A bicycle skeleton in motion shown in side view: a horizontal frame translated forward from the world origin along world +X; two orange pivot circles at the rear and front axles representing the wheels; a third pivot circle at the crank between them; frame triads (RGB axis indicators) at every joint. The bike is rolling under pedal torque — the wheels rotate and the chassis has translated several metres from the origin.
